name: Pannacotta Fugo
alt_names: パンナコッタ・フーゴ
description:
__Height__: 178 cm
__Nationality__: Italian
__Occupation__: Passione Soldato, Bucciarati's Subordinate
__Stand__: Purple Haze

Pannacotta Fugo is part of Bruno Bucciarati's gang. He is a serious and caring but easily enraged youth. A young and quick-tempered strategist, Fugo is a member of Bucciarati's team and, by extension, Passione. In addition to being one of the more calculated members on the team, he possesses the particularly deadly Stand, Purple Haze.

~!He follows Giorno and Bucciarati in their mission to protect Trish Una. He uses his Purple Haze to help retrieve the key and after safely escort Trish to the boss, but he was not sure about following his gang in betraying the boss, so he dropped out of the gang.!~
